---
title: "ISA401NewFinalProject"
author: "Trevor Leonard, Mike Pohrte & AJ Palmer"
date: "2026-05-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Step 0 - Get packages - *Install packages if not already done*

```{r}

library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggpath)
library(hockeyR)
library(ggplot2)


```




# Step 1 - API Extraction and Webscrape - CSV File Creation

```{r}

# 1. API EXTRACTION 
seasons <- paste0(2014:2023, 2015:2024)

fetch_nhl_data <- function(season, game_type) {
  url <- paste0("https://api.nhle.com/stats/rest/en/team/summary?limit=100&cayenneExp=seasonId=", season, "%20and%20gameTypeId=", game_type)
  resp <- GET(url)
  if (status_code(resp) == 200) {
    fromJSON(content(resp, "text", encoding = "UTF-8"))$data
  } else { return(NULL) }
}

reg_stats <- map_df(seasons, function(s) {
  data <- fetch_nhl_data(s, 2)
  if (!is.null(data)) {
    data %>%
      mutate(Season = paste0(substr(s, 1, 4), "-", substr(s, 5, 8))) %>%
      select(Team_Name = teamFullName, Season, GP = gamesPlayed, Wins = wins, Points = points,
             Shots_For_Per_Game = shotsForPerGame, Goals_For_Per_Game = goalsForPerGame, 
             Goals_Against_Per_Game = goalsAgainstPerGame)
  }
})

playoff_stats <- map_df(seasons, function(s) {
  data <- fetch_nhl_data(s, 3)
  if (!is.null(data)) {
    data %>%
      mutate(Season = paste0(substr(s, 1, 4), "-", substr(s, 5, 8))) %>%
      select(Team_Name = teamFullName, Season, Playoff_Wins = wins)
  }
})

# 2. Web Scraping 
wiki_url <- "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_National_Hockey_League_arenas"
wiki_page <- read_html(wiki_url)
raw_wiki <- wiki_page %>% html_node(".wikitable") %>% html_table(fill = TRUE)
colnames(raw_wiki) <- tolower(colnames(raw_wiki))

arena_df <- raw_wiki %>%
  select(team, capacity) %>%
  mutate(
    # Montreal join since the accent is in place
    Team_Name = trimws(gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", team)),
    Team_Name = ifelse(grepl("Montr", Team_Name), "Montreal Canadiens", Team_Name),
    Arena_Capacity = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", capacity))
  ) %>%
  select(Team_Name, Arena_Capacity)

# 3. Logo Metadata
all_logo_cols <- colnames(hockeyR::team_logos_colors)
name_col <- all_logo_cols[grepl("team_name|team_full_name", all_logo_cols, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]

logo_data <- hockeyR::team_logos_colors %>%
  select(Join_Name = all_of(name_col), team_logo_espn) %>%
  mutate(Join_Name = ifelse(grepl("Montr", Join_Name), "Montreal Canadiens", Join_Name))

# 4. Drop the Expansion Teams/Old Team
teams_to_drop <- c("Vegas Golden Knights", "Utah Mammoth", "Utah Hockey Club", "Arizona Coyotes", "Seattle Kraken")

tableau_output <- reg_stats %>%
  left_join(playoff_stats, by = c("Team_Name", "Season")) %>%
  # Standardize Montreal
  mutate(Team_Name = ifelse(grepl("Montr", Team_Name), "Montreal Canadiens", Team_Name)) %>%
  left_join(arena_df, by = "Team_Name") %>%
  filter(!Team_Name %in% teams_to_drop) %>%
  mutate(Playoff_Wins = ifelse(is.na(Playoff_Wins), 0, Playoff_Wins))

# Export the CSV file to working directory
write.csv(tableau_output, "NHL10yrFinalAdvancedStats.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```



# Step 2 - Data Visualizations Using Package
### Shot Volume vs. Playoff Wins

```{r}

# Collapse the 10-year data into team averages for the plot
plot_data_clean <- tableau_output %>%
  group_by(Team_Name) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Shots_For = mean(Shots_For_Per_Game, na.rm = TRUE),
    Avg_Playoff_Wins = mean(Playoff_Wins, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Find the hockeyR
all_cols <- colnames(hockeyR::team_logos_colors)
name_col_ref <- all_cols[grepl("team_name|team_full_name", all_cols, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]

logos <- hockeyR::team_logos_colors %>%
  filter(status == "active") %>%
  select(Join_Name = all_of(name_col_ref), team_logo_espn) %>%
  mutate(Join_Name = ifelse(grepl("Montr", Join_Name), "Montreal Canadiens", Join_Name))

# Join stats with logos
final_plot_df <- plot_data_clean %>%
  inner_join(logos, by = c("Team_Name" = "Join_Name"))

# Generate the Graph
ggplot(final_plot_df, aes(x = Avg_Shots_For, y = Avg_Playoff_Wins)) +
  # Add trend line
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linetype = "dashed", se = FALSE, alpha = 0.4) +
  
  # Add Logos
  ggpath::geom_from_path(aes(path = team_logo_espn), width = 0.05) +
  
  # Change Scales
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  
  # Formatting and Labels
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Shot Volume vs. Postseason Success",
    subtitle = "10-Year Average (2014-2023) | Regular Season Shots vs. Playoff Wins",
    x = "Avg Shots For Per Game",
    y = "Avg Playoff Wins Per Season",
    caption = "Data: NHL API & Wikipedia | Logos: hockeyR"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.margin = margin(25, 25, 25, 25), 
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Export
ggsave("ShotVolPlayoffSuccess.png", width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 1000)

```


### Goals For vs. Playoff Wins Visualization

```{r}

# Data frame
final_gf_plot_df <- tableau_output %>%
  group_by(Team_Name) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_GF_Per_Game = mean(Goals_For_Per_Game, na.rm = TRUE),
    Avg_Playoff_Wins = mean(Playoff_Wins, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Join with logos
  inner_join(logos, by = c("Team_Name" = "Join_Name"))


ggplot(final_gf_plot_df, aes(x = Avg_GF_Per_Game, y = Avg_Playoff_Wins)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linetype = "dashed", se = FALSE, alpha = 0.4) +
  
  # Team logos
  ggpath::geom_from_path(aes(path = team_logo_espn), width = 0.05) +
  
  # Scale
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  
  # Formatting and labels
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Offensive Production vs. Playoff Success",
    subtitle = "10-Year Average (2014-2023) | Goals For vs. Playoff Wins",
    x = "Avg Goals For Per Game",
    y = "Avg Playoff Wins Per Season",
    caption = "Data: NHL API | Logos: hockeyR"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.margin = margin(25, 25, 25, 25), 
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


# Export
ggsave("OffensePlayoffSuccess.png", width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 1000)



```


### Goals Against vs. Playoff Wins Visualization

```{r}

# Join and Playoff/GA per Game
final_ga_plot_df <- tableau_output %>%
  group_by(Team_Name) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_GA_Per_Game = mean(Goals_Against_Per_Game, na.rm = TRUE),
    Avg_Playoff_Wins = mean(Playoff_Wins, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  inner_join(logos, by = c("Team_Name" = "Join_Name"))

# Plot
ggplot(final_ga_plot_df, aes(x = Avg_GA_Per_Game, y = Avg_Playoff_Wins)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linetype = "dashed", se = FALSE, alpha = 0.4) +
  
  # Team Logos
  ggpath::geom_from_path(aes(path = team_logo_espn), width = 0.05) +
  
  # Scale/format 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  
  # Formatting and labels
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Defense vs. Playoff Success",
    subtitle = "10-Year Average (2014-2023) | Goals Against vs. Playoff Wins",
    x = "Avg Goals Against Per Game",
    y = "Avg Playoff Wins Per Season",
    caption = "Data: NHL API | Logos: hockeyR"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.margin = margin(25, 25, 25, 25), 
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


# Export
ggsave("DefensePlayoffSuccess.png", width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 1000)



```



### Playoff Wins Total by Team Visualization

```{r}

# Aggregate for TOTAL wins
playoff_total_data <- tableau_output %>%
  group_by(Team_Name) %>%
  summarise(Total_Playoff_Wins = sum(Playoff_Wins, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  inner_join(logos, by = c("Team_Name" = "Join_Name")) %>%
  # Sort teams by Total Wins (Highest on the left)
  mutate(Team_Name = reorder(Team_Name, -Total_Playoff_Wins))

# --- 2. THE PLOT ---
ggplot(playoff_total_data, aes(x = Team_Name, y = Total_Playoff_Wins)) +
  # Create the vertical bars
  geom_col(fill = "#00205B", alpha = 0.85, width = 0.7) +
  
  # PLACE LOGOS ON X-AXIS
  ggpath::geom_from_path(aes(path = team_logo_espn, y = -3), width = 0.03) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + 
  
  # Adjust y-scale to give a little buffer at the bottom
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) + 
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Postseason Wins (2014-2023)",
    subtitle = "Ranked by cumulative franchise success",
    x = NULL, 
    y = "Total Playoff Wins",
    caption = "Data Source: NHL API"
  ) +
  theme(
    # Remove the standard text labels
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 80, 20) 
  )

# Export
ggsave("TotalPostSeasonWins.png", width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 1000)


```
